results.summary: Two amendments were added for solicitation 19SA7026Q0009, one extending the proposal due date and another publishing questions and answers.

results.site: U.S. Embassy Pakistan Seal U.S. EMBASSY & CONSULATES IN PAKISTAN
results.summary: The tender for Exterior Façade Repair at US Consulate General Karachi had its proposal submission deadline extended via Amendment 2 from July 27, 2026 to August 7, 2026.
The 'More Information' field for an existing concrete materials tender was updated to add a 'Questions and Answers' reference.

details.summary: New listing is primarily about preventive maintenance (CAT generators), which is on the IGNORE list.

details.site: U.S. Embassy & Consulates in India - Mombai
details.summary: New tender is primarily a preventive maintenance service contract, which is on the IGNORE list (preventive maintenance / services).
Priority keyword 'request' matched. A new request for quotations appeared for residential generator maintenance expendable.
A new tender for the CGR Kitchen Rehabilitation Project appeared, and an existing SUV purchase RFQ was cancelled. Note the SUV items are IGNORE-list topics (suv/sport utility vehicle).

details.site: U.S. EMBASSY & CONSULATES IN SAUDI ARABIA
details.summary: A new tender appeared for the replacement of roll-up garage doors at Government-Owned residential housing units in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

details.site: U.S. EMBASSY & CONSULATES IN SOUTH AFRICA
details.summary: A new expression of interest tender has appeared for roof canopies construction work.
A new tender for IT equipment has appeared under the INL-RFQ listings.
An existing tender for a pool fence has been removed from the listing, indicating it has closed or been withdrawn.

Amendment to existing tender 'New American Space in Mansoura Renovation Project' with additional documents/attachments (estimates, schedules, BOQ, design presentation, queries responses) added to the listing.
A new tender for the supply of electrical items has appeared on the U.S. Embassy in Ethiopia opportunities page.
Amendment 0001 issued for RFQ 19KU2026Q0006 – Renovate Embassy Playground, changing the quotation due date.
New tender added is primarily about preventive maintenance of CAT generators, which falls under the IGNORE list (preventive maintenance).
Two new tenders appeared but both are primarily service-based (transportation services and cleaning/disinfecting service), which fall on the IGNORE list.
Priority keyword 'request' matched. A new tender appeared: a Request for Quotations for residential generator maintenance expendables. (Note: a catering services request was also removed.)
A new entry for a US Embassy Yaounde online auction was added, and a 'Request for Information' entry was removed. Both topics fall on the IGNORE list (auction and request for information).

Removed entries include a Sport Utility Vehicle (SUV) purchase and a kitchen rehabilitation project; the remaining changed entry is an SUV purchase which is on the IGNORE list (suv). The only substantive change is a date

details.site: U.S. EMBASSY & CONSULATES IN SAUDI ARABIA
details.summary: Multiple new tenders appeared. Actionable construction/goods tenders include Demolition & Refurbishment of DOW, Electrical Repairs at Annex Freedom Hall, Roof Repairs & Insulation, and additional electrical power utility

An existing tender for the New American Space in Mansoura Renovation Project had its attachment list simplified (removed several design/estimate references), but the tender itself and its closing date are unchanged.
An existing tender for electrical items has been removed from the Open Opportunities list, indicating it has closed or been withdrawn.
Matched priority keyword 'request'. A new Request for Quotation for fall protection/chain link installations at the Lochab compound has appeared.
Removed two service tenders (Local Physician Services and Lodging services) and added a new tender for Grounds Maintenance Services; all involved items are services on the IGNORE list.
Two new tenders appeared but both are primarily for services (transportation services and cleaning/disinfecting service), which are on the IGNORE list.
